# Ribermax Embalagens de Madeira

> Ribermax manufactures custom wooden packaging for industrial equipment,
> machines, and export shipments from Ribeirao Preto, Brazil. The site
> presents product pages, company information, and contact options.

This website is published at https://ribermax.com.br. Use the pages below
as the primary sources for accurate product and company information.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://ribermax.com.br/): Company overview, product highlights,
  and contact sections.
- [Cookie policy](https://ribermax.com.br/politica-de-cookies-br): Cookie
  consent and privacy information.

## Product and SEO pages

- [Wooden export packaging](https://ribermax.com.br/embalagem-madeira-exportacao):
  Export-focused wooden packaging solutions.
- [Plywood wooden boxes](https://ribermax.com.br/caixa-madeira-compensado):
  Plywood boxes for industrial equipment transport.
- [Fumigated export boxes](https://ribermax.com.br/caixa-madeira-fumigada-exportacao):
  NIMF-15 certified packaging for international export.
- [Wooden crates for equipment](https://ribermax.com.br/engradado-madeira-equipamentos):
  Crate solutions for machines and heavy equipment.
- [Sitemap](https://ribermax.com.br/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexed URLs.

## Crawling guidance

- Prefer canonical URLs on https://ribermax.com.br.
- Product pages under the site root provide the most detailed content.
- Contact actions include WhatsApp and email links shown on the home page.

## Optional

- [Login portal](http://ribermax.com/?page=login): External customer login,
  not required for public site understanding.
